response.overview: EVERYBODY LOVES SALSA! is an animated music and dance short film that celebrates Latin American rhythm, movement, and Colombian culture. Directed by Daniel Cordero, the film blends 2D, 3D, and stop-motion animation with two original songs created by Colombian musicians, a salsa track and a piece inspired by Pacific South traditions.  Ten years in the making, Everybody Loves Salsa is a visual love letter to Cali, Colombia, where color, music, and dance merge into a living expression of community and joy.
response.title: EVERYBODY LOVES SALSA!
